testsuite.name: Routes unit tests with mocked DB

testcase.classname: Routes unit tests with mocked DB GET /health returns 200 when DB query succeeds

testcase.classname: Routes unit tests with mocked DB GET /health returns 503 when DB query fails
testcase.name: Routes unit tests with mocked DB GET /health returns 503 when DB query fails

testcase.classname: Routes unit tests with mocked DB GET /products returns 200 and product list when DB succeeds
testcase.name: Routes unit tests with mocked DB GET /products returns 200 and product list when DB succeeds

testcase.classname: Routes unit tests with mocked DB GET /products returns 500 when DB query fails
testcase.name: Routes unit tests with mocked DB GET /products returns 500 when DB query fails

testcase.classname: Error handling tests Malformed JSON returns 400
testcase.name: Error handling tests Malformed JSON returns 400

testcase.classname: Error handling tests Health endpoint returns 200 when DB is available

testcase.classname: db.getPool() should create a new pool if none exists
testcase.name: db.getPool() should create a new pool if none exists

testcase.classname: db.getPool() should return the same pool on subsequent calls
